Class Ui

Namespace
FluentGpu.Dsl

FluentGpu.Dsl.dll

Fluent C# markup. using static FluentGpu.Dsl.Ui; to author trees as expressions.

public static class Ui

Methods

AutoGrid(float, float, float, params Element[])

A responsive auto-fill grid: packs as many equal (1fr) columns as fit at ≥ minColWidth, stretched to fill the width with no ragged edge, reflowing the column count as the width changes — CSS repeat(auto-fill, minmax(minColWidth, 1fr)). Cells flow row-major; gap applies on both axes.

public static GridEl AutoGrid(float minColWidth, float gap, float rowHeight, params Element[] children)

Parameters

minColWidth float
gap float
rowHeight float
children Element[]

Returns

GridEl

Caption(string) 

public static TextEl Caption(string t)

Parameters

t string

Returns

TextEl

Card(params Element[])

A Fluent card surface: CardBackground fill + CardStroke 1px border + OverlayCornerRadius + a resting elevation shadow + inner padding. The workhorse container for the gallery's example cards and sample tiles.

public static BoxEl Card(params Element[] children)

Parameters

children Element[]

Returns

BoxEl

Display(string) 

public static TextEl Display(string t)

Parameters

t string

Returns

TextEl

Divider(bool)

A 1px hairline divider (DividerStroke). Horizontal by default; vertical stretches to its parent's cross axis.

public static BoxEl Divider(bool vertical = false)

Parameters

vertical bool

Returns

BoxEl

Grid(TrackSize[], float, float, float, params Element[])

A CSS-grid of children auto-flowed into columns tracks.

public static GridEl Grid(TrackSize[] columns, float colGap, float rowGap, float rowHeight, params Element[] children)

Parameters

columns TrackSize[]
colGap float
rowGap float
rowHeight float
children Element[]

GridEl

gap float

Heading(string) 

public static TextEl Heading(string text)

Parameters

text string

Returns

TextEl

Icon(string, float, ColorF?, string?)

A font icon (WinUI FontIcon): a glyph rendered from an icon font. Use Icons for the glyph, or pass any codepoint string (e.g. "") + a family (system name or "path.ttf#Family").

public static TextEl Icon(string glyph, float size = 16, ColorF? color = null, string? family = null)

Parameters

glyph string
size float
color ColorF?
family string

Returns

TextEl

Image(string, ImageFit, float, float, float, ColorF?, string?, ImageTransition?)

A responsive image: no fixed extent — it fills the width its layout gives it and (with aspect set) derives its height (CSS aspect-ratio), then maps its pixels into that box per fit (default Cover — aspect-preserving crop). The album/thumbnail grid shape. decodePx is the decode-size hint (the real box size isn't known at request time).

public static ImageEl Image(string source, ImageFit fit, float aspect = NaN, float decodePx = NaN, float corners = 0, ColorF? placeholder = null, string? blurHash = null, ImageTransition? transition = null)

Parameters

source string
fit ImageFit
aspect float
decodePx float
corners float
placeholder ColorF?
blurHash string
transition ImageTransition?

Returns

ImageEl

Image(string, ImageFit, float, float, float, string)

A responsive image whose pending placeholder comes from a CSS-style hex color code.

public static ImageEl Image(string source, ImageFit fit, float aspect, float decodePx, float corners, string placeholder)

Parameters

source string
fit ImageFit
aspect float
decodePx float
corners float
placeholder string

Returns

ImageEl

Image(string, float, float, float, ColorF?, string?, ImageTransition?)

An async, cached, residency-pinned image (album art). Shows a placeholder (flat tint, or a BlurHash LQIP preview when blurHash is given) until the full-res art decodes off-thread.

public static ImageEl Image(string source, float width, float height, float corners = 0, ColorF? placeholder = null, string? blurHash = null, ImageTransition? transition = null)

Parameters

source string
width float
height float
corners float
placeholder ColorF?
blurHash string
transition ImageTransition?

Returns

ImageEl

Image(string, float, float, float, string)

An async image whose pending placeholder comes from a CSS-style hex color code.

public static ImageEl Image(string source, float width, float height, float corners, string placeholder)

Parameters

source string
width float
height float
corners float
placeholder string

Returns

ImageEl

Layer(Edges4, params Element[])

A layer surface (flyout / expander body): LayerFill + SurfaceStroke + OverlayCornerRadius + flyout shadow.

public static BoxEl Layer(Edges4 pad, params Element[] children)

Parameters

pad Edges4
children Element[]

Returns

BoxEl

LinearGradient(float, params GradientStop[])

A linear gradient fill spec (angle 0 = left→right, 90 = top→bottom). Apply with .Gradient(...).

public static GradientSpec LinearGradient(float angleDeg, params GradientStop[] stops)

Parameters

angleDeg float
stops GradientStop[]

Returns

GradientSpec

Panel(Edges4, float, params Element[])

A padded panel (container with inner padding) — gives content WinUI-like breathing room.

public static BoxEl Panel(Edges4 padding, float gap, params Element[] children)

Parameters

padding Edges4
gap float
children Element[]

Returns

BoxEl

Pill(string, bool, Action)

A SelectorBar pill: rounded-16, accent-filled when selected, subtle hover otherwise.

public static BoxEl Pill(string label, bool selected, Action onClick)

Parameters

label string
selected bool
onClick Action

Returns

BoxEl

RadialGradient(params GradientStop[])

A radial gradient fill spec (center→edge). Apply with .Gradient(...).

public static GradientSpec RadialGradient(params GradientStop[] stops)

Parameters

stops GradientStop[]

Returns

GradientSpec

ScrollView(Element, bool)

A vertically-scrolling, clipping viewport over content (typically a tall VStack).

public static ScrollEl ScrollView(Element content, bool horizontal = false)

Parameters

content Element
horizontal bool

Returns

ScrollEl

SectionHeader(string, string?)

A section header: a BodyStrong title (+ optional Caption subtitle) with the standard top rhythm.

public static BoxEl SectionHeader(string title, string? caption = null)

title string
caption string

UniformGrid(int, float, float, params Element[])

A uniform N-column grid of equal star tracks (the common album/artist card-grid shape).

public static GridEl UniformGrid(int columns, float gap, float rowHeight, params Element[] children)

Parameters

columns int
gap float
rowHeight float
children Element[]

Returns

GridEl

public static BoxEl VStack(float gap, params Element[] children)

Parameters

gap float
children Element[]

Returns

BoxEl

ZStack(params Element[])

A z-stack: children overlay at the origin, painted in order (last on top) — overlays, scrims, flyouts.

public static BoxEl ZStack(params Element[] children)

Parameters

children Element[]

Returns

BoxEl
FluentGpu — a near-zero-allocation, NativeAOT, GPU-rendered UI engine for .NET 10. Usage docs live here; architecture canon lives in design/ (SPEC-INDEX.md is the precedence authority).
